conversion_source: LEAP capital-cost convention: USD/(GJ/yr of capacity) stores the same numeric value as overnight USD per annual GJ produced.
conversion_caveat: If your USD/GJ is amortised (LCOE-style) rather than overnight, divide by capital-recovery factor before using.

conversion_source: IEA: 1 TCE = 29.3076 GJ (7000 kcal/kg equivalent). USD/GJ × 29.3076 = USD/TCE; LEAP /Year denotes annual capacity, treated as identity.
conversion_caveat: Same overnight-vs-amortised caveat as USD/GJ → USD/(GJ/yr).
